payload.gap_text: Due to employee movements, resulting from the transformation, all utilization goals will require recalculation to be provided later.
payload.missing_information: Utilization goals not yet recalculated due to transformation-related employee movements

tool_args.label: Most Frequently Cited Internal EEO Basis

payload.claim_text: The most frequently cited basis internally was race/color.

tool_args.label: Most Frequently Cited Title VI Basis

payload.claim_text: The most frequently cited basis was race.

tool_args.label: Empowering Women in Transportation Self-Care Event

payload.description: Empowering Women in Transportation (EWT) invited colleagues to a self-care journey. They shared Professional, Physical, Fiscal and Mental self-care tools and tips from EWT members.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: All Generational ERG First Day of School Event

payload.description: In celebration of Intergenerational Month, the All Generational ERG created a 'First Day of School' presentation. They encouraged their members and other employees to share pictures of their children's first day back to school. The pictures were transformed into a video that was shared agencywide.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: Latinos & Friends Hispanic Heritage Month Celebration

payload.description: Latinos & Friends ERG celebrated the month-long observance of Hispanic heritage and culture.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.description: Cafecito Chat was an opportunity for MTA Chief Administrative Officer Lissette Camilo to share her career trajectory and route for employee career development. Lissette was interviewed by Gabriella Palencia, Executive Agency Counsel. Lissette also answered employees' questions that centered on career advancement.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: Veterans ERG Suicide Prevention Awareness Event

payload.description: September is Suicide Prevention Month. The Veterans ERG held an observance to raise awareness and help reduce stigma. MTA's Work Life Services and Local U.S. Veterans Affairs Representatives were on hand to speak and share resources with employees.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.
event.participants is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Participant lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: has_participant.

tool_args.label: Second Cafecito Chat with Chris Pangilinan

payload.description: The second Cafecito Chat was hosted by Latino & Friends and Abilities Employee Resource Groups. Daisy Mendez interviewed Chris Pangilinan, Vice President of Paratransit. Chris shared his insight navigating a large organization and imparted core skills necessary for career advancement.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: Como Yo Spanish Language Program Launch

payload.description: 'Como Yo' (Like Me) is a fun and exciting program to connect and practice conversational Spanish with colleagues across all agencies. Latinos & Friends paired Spanish Language 'beginners' with fluent Spanish speaking colleagues.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.
